text: AWS Certificate Manager (ACIV) @ mwsunearnanaia @) scrancane ¢ HTTP - Simple and Insecure ¢ HTTPS - SSL/TLS Layer of Encryption added to HTTP e Data is encrypted in-transit ¢ Certificates prove identity ¢ Chain of trust - Signed by a trusted authority ¢ ACM lets you run a public or private Certificate Authority (CA) ¢ Private CA - Applications need to trust your private CA e Public CA - Browsers trust a list of providers, which can trust other providers
